source: SEDAR+ (document.html?id=1d807db7135875338993ce126042ed0dffe296267f03daa317fc69f1f51b9c29), Q2 2025 results press release – 2025 guidance summary table

assets.name: Agnico Eagle Consolidated (approx.)
assets.notes: MVP assumptions for charting using consolidated 2025 guidance midpoint. Gold production 3.3-3.5 Moz => Year1-5 = 3.4 Moz = 3,400 koz. AISC 1250-1300 => midpoint 1275 USD/oz. Total capex excluding capitalized exploration 1,750-1,950 + capitalized exploration 290-310 => midpoint 2,150 USDm per year. For now, we repeat 2025 guidance across next 5 years because mine-level forward schedules are not extracted yet.
